privileged_info_summary: No metadata field exists in task.json for this drop_shadow task. The task uses real images from Unsplash (photo IDs photo-1611224923853 and photo-1572044162444-ad60f128bdea) with automatic fallback to a synthetically-generated logo image created with ImageMagick if downloads fail. The task applies GIMP 2.10's Drop Shadow filter from the Filters > Light and Shadow menu. The verifier detects shadows by analyzing luminance differences between original and result images, checking for shadow regions (>200 pixels), proper offset direction (down and right), appropriate darkness (<120 brightness), and soft edges. Task requires 4 out of 5 criteria (shadow detection, offset, color, edge softness, image modification) for success (75%+ score).
